rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); independent scoring per result; total_hits sums per-result hit flags; verdict FAIL if total_hits>=1
candidate_summary: CHROMATOPHORE-QUAD 4-channel context-gating per attention head: split each head's d_v into 4 equal quadrants {v^(1..4)}, compute K=4 independent sigmoid gates g^(k)=sigmoid(W_g^(k) x_t), head output = concat[g^(k) v^(k)]. Claims to recombine per-head value-dim split + per-quadrant independent context-gate as a more flexible variant of single-per-head Gated Attention.

results_analysis.title: Gated Attention for LLMs (NeurIPS 2025)
results_analysis.notes: Direct prior art for per-head sigmoid context gate after SDPA; CHROMATOPHORE-QUAD only refines to K=4 quadrants instead of 1. Same architectural slot.

results_analysis.title: NeurIPS 2025 Gated Attention (Qwen3-Next)
results_analysis.notes: Same Gated Attention deployment integrated in Qwen3-Next; identical architectural slot to candidate.

results_analysis.title: Masked Gated Linear Unit (MGLU, 2025/06)
results_analysis.notes: Per-element gate-or-value masks generalize 4-quadrant masking to finer granularity.

results_analysis.title: Masked GLU (OpenReview)
results_analysis.notes: OpenReview venue of MGLU; same per-element mask prior art.

results_analysis.title: Gated Linear Unit overview
results_analysis.notes: Full per-dimension independent gating subsumes 4-channel quadrant gating as a coarser special case.

results_analysis.title: GLU: FFN Architecture Behind Modern LLMs
results_analysis.notes: Modern LLMs (LLaMA, Mistral) already use per-channel gating in FFN; established prior art.

results_analysis.title: Recurrent Memory-Augmented Transformers Chunked Attention
results_analysis.notes: Three attention streams aggregated via learned gated sum -- same multi-channel gate-aggregation pattern.

results_analysis.title: HEADINFER: Memory-Efficient LLM Inference
results_analysis.notes: KV-cache offloading not value-quadrant gating; no architectural overlap.

verdict_sentence: CHROMATOPHORE-QUAD fails novelty: 7 of 8 results clear the hit rule across keyword, semantic, and functional channels; per-head sigmoid context gating (Gated Attention 2505.06708, Qwen3-Next), per-dimension/per-element GLU gating (MGLU, SwiGLU/GeGLU), and multi-stream gated sums already cover the per-head-split + independent-context-gate slot, leaving K=4 quadrant fixity as a trivial coarsening of established prior art.
